VP1-Step1.title: Basic discovery
VP1-Step1.expected: Positive integer. Response contains sessions array and sources object.
VP1-Step1.actual: 740 sessions. Response has 'sessions' array and 'sources' object with claude/codex/opencode keys.

VP1-Step2.title: Discovery with since filter
VP1-Step2.expected: Fewer or equal sessions compared to Step 1.
VP1-Step2.actual: 0 sessions (all 740 have empty last_activity, so none pass the since filter). 0 <= 740.

VP2-Step1.title: Source availability
VP2-Step1.actual: claude: {available: true, session_count: 740}, codex: {available: false, session_count: 0}, opencode: {available: false, session_count: 0}

VP3-Step1.title: Trigger sync via API
VP3-Step1.expected: Response with inserted, updated, and watermark fields.

VP3-Step2.title: Verify synced sessions appear in history
VP3-Step2.expected: Some sessions have origin='discovered' and non-null sdk_session_id.
VP3-Step2.actual: Mix of origin='duraclaw' (sdk_session_id=null) and origin='discovered' (sdk_session_id set) sessions.

VP4-Step1.title: Sync twice, verify no duplicates
VP4-Step1.actual: First sync: inserted=0. Second sync: inserted=0. (All 590 already synced in VP3.)

VP5-Step1.title: Blended UI - session history table
VP5-Step1.expected: Table shows sessions with agent badges. Some rows have cost/model, others show '-'.
VP5-Step1.actual: Table has columns: Session, Agent, Project, Status, Created, Duration, Cost, Turns. Agent column shows 'claude'. Duraclaw sessions show cost ($0.22) and duration (38s). Discovered sessions show '-' for cost/duration and '—' for turns. Resume buttons on discovered sessions. 592 total sessions.

VP6-Step1.title: Resume a discovered session
VP6-Step1.command: Click Resume button on discovered session (baseplane-dev1 project, 'planning mode 2180')
VP6-Step1.expected: New session starts in correct project, conversation context preserved.
VP6-Step1.actual: Clicked Resume on baseplane-dev1 discovered session 'planning mode 2180'. POST /api/sessions called with sdk_session_id. New SessionDO created (id=0484b0c5...). Navigated to /?session=0484b0c5... Gateway received resume command and started executing. Chat log showed 'Thought for 1 second', tool calls (ToolSearch), permission requests — conversation context preserved from original session.
VP6-Step1.fix_applied: Resume button was initially navigate-only. Fixed to call POST /api/sessions with sdk_session_id, added resumeDiscovered() method to SessionDO, and wired up the full resume flow.

notes: Gateway had to be restarted with latest code (discovery endpoint was missing on old process).
Worker had to be redeployed (404 on /api/sessions/sync before deploy).
All 740 discovered sessions have empty last_activity — the since filter works but returns 0 results due to missing SDK metadata.

VP6 initially failed — Resume button only navigated without spawning. Fixed by adding POST /api/sessions call with sdk_session_id and resumeDiscovered() to SessionDO. Redeployed and re-verified successfully.
